name: forwardMessage
description: Use this method to forward messages of any kind. Service messages and messages with protected content can't be forwarded. On success, the sent Message

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username

parameters.name: message_thread_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum; for forum supergroups and private chats of bots with forum topic mode enabled only

parameters.name: direct_messages_topic_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the direct messages topic to which the message will be forwarded; required if the message is forwarded to a direct messages chat

parameters.name: from_chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the chat where the original message was sent (or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username)

parameters.name: video_start_timestamp
parameters.description: New start timestamp for the forwarded video in the message

parameters.name: disable_notification
parameters.description: Sends the message silently. Users will receive a notification with no sound.

parameters.name: protect_content
parameters.description: Protects the contents of the forwarded message from forwarding and saving

parameters.name: message_effect_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the message effect to be added to the message; only available when forwarding to private chats

parameters.name: suggested_post_parameters
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object containing the parameters of the suggested post to send; for direct messages chats only

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Message identifier in the chat specified in from_chat_id
